task_objective: Fix focus highlight regression by removing PanelSectionRow wrappers around ToggleField elements and configuring native highlightOnFocus props.
design_decisions: Removed `<PanelSectionRow>` wrapping from ToggleField components to avoid layout and focus conflict inside `<PanelSection>`.
Used native `highlightOnFocus` prop on ToggleField components directly.
Added a regression test to verify ToggleField is never wrapped in PanelSectionRow.
results: All quality control checks (ruff format, check, ty typecheck) and the pytest suite (250 passing tests) completed successfully.
